questionHtml: Deduce the final evolutionary state of Eta Cassiopeiae A.
markschemeHtml:
mass of the «remnant» star <1.4M⊙ OR Chandrasekhar limit
OR
mass OR luminosity similar to the Sun ✔

the final stage is white dwarf ✔

meta.title: Deduce the final evolutionary state of Eta Cassiopeiae A.
